title: humboltia hians
intro: Humboltia hians, also known as the "Monkey face vine", is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is known for its unique appearance, with its white or pale yellow flowers resembling a monkey's face, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Humboltia hians include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and glycosides. Humboltia hians is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, and is often prepared as a herbal tea or extract for its health benefits.
